cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which penguin is younger than Louis. First, I need to find out Louis's age. From the table, Louis is 7 years old. So I need to look at the other penguins and see if any of them are younger than 7. Looking at the list: - Bernard is 5 years old. That's younger than Louis's 7. - Vincent is 9, which is older. - Gwen is 8, also older. - The options also include James, but there's no data
